recurring_credits.name: Global Entry / TSA PreCheck Application Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $120 statement credit reimbursing Global Entry / TSA PreCheck application fee. Renews every 4 years.
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: Statement credit of up to $120 every 4 years as a reimbursement for the application fee charged for trusted traveler programs

_excluded: Free first checked bag for cardholder + 8 companions (qualitative)
Pay Yourself Back (redemption mechanic, not a credit)
Annual Worldwide Companion Pass after $15k spend (conditional)
